text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm looking for some<n>training
books in the library...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! I had my eye on that book you're<n>holdin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm always thinkin' 'bout what I<n>need to work
on in order to keep up<n>with the pack, even in a
stampede!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I wanna hear your opinion!Lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Speed? Now there's an idea! Just<n>gotta run fast,
get around your target,<n>aaand...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I'll give it a shot right<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mere, hon! There's no escapin'<n>this hug
monster! I'll chase ya to the<n>edge of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Just gotta get a hold<n>of
everyone with my power and...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I'll give it a shot right<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mere, hon! Get ready for the<n>strongest hug
you've ever had in<n>your life!
